## Build an effective team with our online tests for Language and Communication

Start testing candidates now

## Use our Language and Communication tests to assess candidates for various job roles such as:

Fresh graduates

German Language Learner

Any professional with basic German Language skills

Entry-Level candidates

German Language Teacher

Sr. Software Engineer -Artificial Intelligence

Candidates with 0 to 1 year of experience

German Language Translator

null

## Our questions measure the following relevant skills:

* The test contains well-balanced and meaningful questions based on the English passages for all levels- easy, medium, and high. The candidate has to answer MCQ questions based on the paragraph, which will indicate their level of comprehension.
* Fundamental knowledge of German grammar.
* Questions on missing words in a paragraph in the German language.
